notes: Synthetic: clean firm with the standard 'no disciplinary history' boilerplate. Dominant case in the population.

inputs.section_body:
Item 9 — Disciplinary Information

Registered investment advisers and their management persons are required to disclose all material facts regarding any legal or disciplinary event that would be material to a client's evaluation of the firm or the integrity of management.

Neither the firm nor any of its management persons has any disciplinary history to disclose.
